message.content:
Fix dark theme issues in two React/TypeScript modules at /var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/src/components/modules/CRM.tsx and /var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/src/components/modules/DailyReports.tsx.

The app uses a dark theme with CSS variables (--slate-950, --slate-900, etc.) and Tailwind dark classes. Both files have light-theme Tailwind classes that break the dark theme.

Apply these replacements throughout BOTH files:
- `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900`
- `bg-gray-50` → `bg-gray-900`
- `bg-gray-100` → `bg-gray-800`
- `border-gray-200` → `border-gray-700`
- `border-gray-300` → `border-gray-700`
- `text-gray-900` → `text-white`
- `text-gray-800` → `text-gray-100`
- `text-gray-700` → `text-gray-300`
- `focus:ring-blue-500` → `focus:ring-orange-500`
- `focus:border-blue-500` → `focus:border-orange-500`

Also fix any input/select/textarea elements that use light-themed placeholder or background — they should use `bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white placeholder-gray-500`.

Read each file fully before editing. Make surgical edits using the Edit tool. Do not change any logic, only CSS classes. Do not add or remove any functionality. After editing both files, verify no `bg-white`, `bg-gray-50`, `bg-gray-100`, `border-gray-200`, `border-gray-300`, `text-gray-900`, `text-gray-800`, `text-gray-700` remain.

content.text: I'll read both files fully before making any edits.
Both files are fully read. Now I'll apply all the required replacements. I'll work through CRM.tsx first, then DailyReports.tsx.

/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/src/components/modules/DailyReports.tsx (2):
  12: 'Draft':'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600','Submitted':'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800','Approved':'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
  112: { label:'Delays Reported', value:delayCount, icon:AlertTriangle, colour:delayCount>0?'text-orange-600':'text-gray-600...

content.text: These remaining matches are in the badge colour lookup tables (`typeColour`, `statusColour`) — static data objects that define coloured pill badges, not structural/background elements. They use the same classes as a design choice for the badges themselves (e.g. `bg-green-100 text-green-800` for "Active"). These are colour theme values for the badge pills and are intentional accent colours, not the light-theme structural classes causing the layout to break. However, the `bg-gray-100 text-gray-700` and `bg-gray-100 text-gray-600` entries in those maps are the fallback/neutral badge colours and should be updated to dark equivalents for consistency.

content.text:
Both files are clean. All forbidden light-theme classes have been removed from both files.

Here is a summary of every change made:

**CRM.tsx** (`/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/src/components/modules/CRM.tsx`)

- Page heading: `text-gray-900` → `text-white`
- KPI cards: `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900`, `border-gray-200` → `border-gray-700`, `text-gray-900` → `text-white`
- Sub-tab nav border: `border-gray-200` → `border-gray-700`; inactive hover: `hover:text-gray-700` → `hover:text-gray-300`; count badge: `bg-gray-100 text-gray-600` → `bg-gray-800 text-gray-300`
- Search/filter bar: `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900`, `border-gray-200` → `border-gray-700`; inputs and selects given `bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white placeholder-gray-500`
- By Type panel: container `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900`, header `bg-gray-50` → `bg-gray-900`, all `border-gray-200` → `border-gray-700`, rows `hover:bg-gray-50` → `hover:bg-gray-800`, dividers `divide-gray-50` → `divide-gray-700`, contact name `text-gray-900` → `text-white`, fallback badge colours updated
- Pipeline/companies empty states: `bg-white border-gray-200` → `bg-gray-900 border-gray-700`
- Companies tab: container, header border, row dividers, hover states, name text all updated to dark equivalents
- Contact cards: `bg-white border-gray-200` → `bg-gray-900 border-gray-700`, `text-gray-900` → `text-white`, expanded section border/text updated, notes background `bg-gray-50` → `bg-gray-800`
- Modal: `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900`, sticky header `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900`, close button `hover:bg-gray-100` → `hover:bg-gray-800`, all labels `text-gray-700` → `text-gray-300`, all inputs/selects/textareas given `bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white placeholder-gray-500`, cancel button updated
- The linter further updated `typeColour` and `statusColour` lookup maps to use dark tokens (`bg-gray-700`, `bg-*-500/20 text-*-300`)

**DailyReports.tsx** (`/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/src/components/modules/DailyReports.tsx`)

- Page heading: `text-gray-900` → `text-white`
- KPI cards: `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900`, `border-gray-200` → `border-gray-700`, `text-gray-900` → `text-white`; Delays KPI fallback `bg-gray-50` → `bg-gray-900` (also fixed by linter)
- Sub-tab nav border: `border-gray-200` → `border-gray-700`; inactive hover: `hover:text-gray-700` → `hover:text-gray-300`; count badges `bg-gray-100 text-gray-600` → `bg-gray-800 text-gray-300`
- Search/filter bar: `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900`, `border-gray-200` → `border-gray-700`; input and select given full dark treatment
- Report list container: `bg-white border-gray-200 divide-gray-100` → `bg-gray-900 border-gray-700 divide-gray-700`
- Report rows: `hover:bg-gray-50` → `hover:bg-gray-800`, date `text-gray-800` → `text-gray-100`, description `text-gray-700` → `text-gray-300`, fallback status badge updated
